testcase.name: test_tc1_textbox_form_fill_and_submit

failure.message:
AssertionError: First stage should be fallback for full_name assert 'rag' == 'fallback'
- fallback + rag

testcase.failure:
fixturefunc = <function verify_trace_stages at 0x000002633BEAE6C0> request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_tc1_textbox_form_fill_and_submit>> kwargs = {'healer': <xpath_healer.api.facade.XPathHealerFacade object at 0x000002633D134D70>, 'scenario_state': {'current_page'...7, 'needs_more_context': True, 'llm_red_flags': ['low_confidence'], 'grounded_in_context': True})], error=None), ...}}}
def call_fixture_func( fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs ) -> FixtureValue: if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc): fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc) generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs) try: fixture_result = next(generator) except StopIteration: raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator) request.addfinalizer(finalizer) else: fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc) > fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
..\..\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\_pytest\fixtures.py:915: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
scenario_state = {'current_page': 'text-box', 'healed': [{'element_name': 'full_name', 'locator_kind': 'role', 'locator_value': "textbo...37, 'needs_more_context': True, 'llm_red_flags': ['low_confidence'], 'grounded_in_context': True})], error=None), ...}} healer = <xpath_healer.api.facade.XPathHealerFacade object at 0x000002633D134D70>
@then("trace logs should contain expected healing stages") def verify_trace_stages(scenario_state: dict[str, Any], healer: XPathHealerFacade) -> None: recovered_by_element: dict[str, Recovered] = scenario_state["recovered"] assert recovered_by_element, "No healed elements captured for trace verification."
for element_name, recovered in recovered_by_element.items(): trace = recovered.trace assert trace, f"Trace is empty for {element_name}" > assert trace[0].stage == "fallback", f"First stage should be fallback for {element_name}" E AssertionError: First stage should be fallback for full_name E assert 'rag' == 'fallback' E E - fallback E + rag
tests\integration\test_demo_qa_healing_bdd.py:549: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_tc2_checkbox_home_icon_select_and_message_verify

failure.message:
AssertionError: First stage should be fallback for home_checkbox_icon assert 'rag' == 'fallback'
- fallback + rag

testcase.failure:

def call_fixture_func( fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs ) -> FixtureValue: if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc): fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc) generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs) try: fixture_result = next(generator) except StopIteration: raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator) request.addfinalizer(finalizer) else: fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc) > fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

@then("trace logs should contain expected healing stages") def verify_trace_stages(scenario_state: dict[str, Any], healer: XPathHealerFacade) -> None: recovered_by_element: dict[str, Recovered] = scenario_state["recovered"] assert recovered_by_element, "No healed elements captured for trace verification."
for element_name, recovered in recovered_by_element.items(): trace = recovered.trace assert trace, f"Trace is empty for {element_name}" > assert trace[0].stage == "fallback", f"First stage should be fallback for {element_name}" E AssertionError: First stage should be fallback for home_checkbox_icon E assert 'rag' == 'fallback' E E - fallback E + rag

testcase.name: test_tc3_webtables_first_row_verification

failure.message:
AssertionError: Healing failed for row1_first_name: {'status': 'failed', 'correlation_id': 'bc48bc49b9cb49dab9ea26f21af44bf0', 'locator_spec': None, 'metadata': None, 'strategy_id': None, 'trace': [{'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_suggest', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': {'kind': 'text', 'value': 'Cierra', 'options': {}, 'scope': None}, 'score': 0.8, 'validation': {'ok': False, 'reason_codes': ['multiple_matches'], 'matched_count': 2, 'chosen_index': None, 'score': None, 'details': {}}, 'duration_ms': 11.298400000669062, 'details': {'source': 'llm', 'rag_pass': 'light', 'deep_graph': True, 'llm_reason': "The element has text 'Cierra', matches field_type:text, and is the top reranked candidate. No evidence of ambiguity in the provided context.", 'llm_confidence': 0.8, 'grounded_in_context': True}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_summary', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': None, 'score': None, 'validation': None, 'duration_ms': None, 'details': {'reason': 'no_valid_candidate'}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_suggest', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': {'kind': 'text', 'value': 'Cierra', 'options': {}, 'scope': None}, 'score': 0.85, 'validation': {'ok': False, 'reason_codes': ['multiple_matches'], 'matched_count': 2, 'chosen_index': None, 'score': None, 'details': {}}, 'duration_ms': 9.34290001168847, 'details': {'source': 'llm', 'rag_pass': 'deep_1', 'deep_graph': True, 'llm_reason': "The element has text 'Cierra', matches the field type 'text', and is associated with the 'row1_first_name' context. No more stable attributes or unique roles are available, but the text is distinctive in the provided context.", 'llm_confidence': 0.85, 'grounded_in_context': True}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_summary', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': None, 'score': None, 'validation': None, 'duration_ms': None, 'details': {'reason': 'no_valid_candidate'}}], 'error': 'All healing stages failed to produce a valid locator.'} assert 'failed' == 'success'
- success + failed

testcase.name: test_tc4_raw_fallback_xpath_fails_without_healer

failure.message: Failed: Intentional failure: raw fallback xpath did not resolve any element: //xh-never-match[@id='raw_xpath_negative-broken']
